title: fix: bump lxml to >=6.1.1 for scrapling compatibility
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Deploy unjammed
gist.blurb: Bumped lxml to version 6.1.1 to play nicely with scrapling and get our deploys flowing again.
gist.summary: Bumped the lxml dependency to version >=6.1.1 in the Polly app to resolve a compatibility conflict with scrapling and fix broken deployments.
gist.impact: Internal deployments for the Polly app now build successfully without dependency conflicts.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a mechanic, fixing a jammed server or pipeline to represent unblocking the deployment. A robot companion holding the new dependency package.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, using a wrench to fix a glowing lime green (#ecf874) server rack. A chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a small box labeled 'lxml'. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
